overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a neon-lit commercial district in Watson at night, passing dead bodies and advertisements, then turning into a grimy back alley filled with trash, and finally emerging onto a sunlit city street with pedestrians and vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial pedestrian arcade with advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through a neon-lit commercial district passing digital advertisements and bodies on the ground

entered.detail: large pink neon billboard advertising 'WATSON WHORE' with showtimes
purple neon-lit food stall with counter and stools
enclosed booth with illuminated product displays
tall rectangular pillar with glowing advertisements on all sides
multiple bodies lying on the red tiled ground throughout the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered commercial arcade illuminated by neon signs including a large 'WATSON WHORE' billboard and a purple ramen shop. The ground is littered with bodies and debris, creating a grim atmosphere in this cyberpunk shopping district.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with vending machines and large digital billboards

agents.ego_description: continuing past burrito vending machines and large digital advertisements

entered.detail: row of green and red automated food dispensers with 'BURRITO' signage
massive wall-mounted digital screen displaying 'V-ED-EARTH' advertisement
tall leafy trees growing in the center of the commercial walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the commercial area, passing green and red burrito vending machines on the right. Large digital billboards dominate the walls ahead, while palm trees become visible in the center distance, indicating a transition toward a more open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: grimy back service alley with trash and industrial infrastructure

events.description: turns left into a narrow back alley away from the main commercial street

agents.ego_description: turning into a dark back alley filled with trash bags and industrial pipes

entered.detail: large piles of blue and black garbage bags stacked against the wall
large green industrial waste containers with open lids
exposed metal piping and ductwork running along the ceiling and walls
scattered flattened cardboard and debris littering the alley floor
tall black metal barred gate at the end of the alley leading to the street

segments.scene_description: Turning sharply left into a narrow service alley, leaving the neon-lit commercial area behind. The environment becomes significantly darker and grittier, with piles of trash bags, dumpsters, and exposed industrial pipes lining the walls. The ground is littered with cardboard and debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban street with vehicle traffic and pedestrians

events.description: exits the dark alley into a bright sunlit city street
transition from dark artificial lighting to bright natural daylight

agents.ego_description: emerging from the alley onto a sunlit street with pedestrians and parked cars

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking across the street ahead
person in dark clothing walking on the sidewalk in the distance

entered.detail: large purple and yellow advertisement for 'Set Sail' chips on the alley wall
silver sedan parked along the curb at the alley exit
modern high-rise skyscrapers with reflective glass facades in the background
tall modern street light pole at the intersection

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark alley into bright daylight, revealing a modern city street with tall glass buildings in the background. A large 'Set Sail' billboard is visible on the right wall, and a parked car sits on the left. Pedestrians are visible walking in the open area ahead, marking a stark contrast to the deserted alley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grim, neon-lit commercial arcade into a dark industrial alley before finally emerging into a bright, bustling city street. It begins by navigating a covered shopping district illuminated by purple ramen shop lights and a large Watson billboard, moving past bodies and debris on the ground. As the camera passes green and red burrito vending machines, the view opens toward distant palm trees before turning sharply left into a narrow service alley. The environment shifts abruptly to a grittier, darker space filled with piles of trash bags, dumpsters, and exposed pipes lining the walls. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows into brilliant daylight, revealing a modern street with tall glass buildings, a parked car, and pedestrians walking beneath a large Set Sail billboard.
